summary: Bug fix verification for iteration 16 - Frontend code analysis and backend API testing completed. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend bug fixes verified via code review (Expo React Native app - not browser testable).

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Expo React Native app (code review verified)

test_credentials: TEST_ prefixed user IDs for isolation
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed drills and scripts created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified for iteration 16. Backend APIs all working. Frontend is Expo React Native (not browser-testable). Code review confirms all three bug fixes implemented correctly.

upload_tsx_fix.fix_description: handleSubmit catch block now extracts real error.message via `error?.message || 'Unknown error'` and displays it via fallback `Upload failed: ${errMsg}` instead of generic 'Failed to create script'

premium_tsx_fix.fix_description: Premium screen now has 8-second timeout to prevent infinite 'Loading subscription options...' spinner. Uses loadingTimedOut state that transitions to error state when rcLoading stays true too long.
key_code_changes: Line 94: const [loadingTimedOut, setLoadingTimedOut] = useState(false) - new state
Lines 112-122: useEffect with setTimeout(8000) sets loadingTimedOut=true if rcLoading && !hasOfferings
Lines 228-232: handleRetryLoadOfferings resets setLoadingTimedOut(false) before retry

daily_drill_tsx_fix.fix_description: loadError changed from boolean to string|null to store actual error message. Error UI now displays the real error message instead of generic 'Unable to load drill'. Retry button has data-testid.
key_code_changes: Line 22: const [loadError, setLoadError] = useState<string | null>(null) - now string|null instead of boolean
Lines 46-50: catch block sets setLoadError(serverMsg || errMsg) with actual message
Lines 123-125: Error UI displays {loadError || 'Check your connection and try again'}
Line 128: Retry button calls setLoadError(null); fetchDrill();
Line 129: data-testid='retry-drill-btn' added to retry button

backend_tests_performed.test: GET /api/daily-drill/{userId} returns drill with challenge_type, title, prompt, etc.
POST /api/scripts/upload accepts multipart form data and creates script
POST /api/scripts/upload with empty file handles gracefully
POST /api/scripts/upload without title returns 422 validation error
GET /api/daily-drill for new user creates drill automatically
